top_signals.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
top_signals.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
top_signals.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
top_signals.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
top_signals.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin, ether ETFs snap eight-week outflow streaks with $282 million combined inflow
top_signals.summary: The preceding eight weeks drained a combined $9.46 billion from the two groups, meaning this week’s rebound recovered only about 3% of those outflows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
top_signals.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: QXO is taking its offer directly to shareholders after being rebuffed on several occasions.

alerts.title: Trump flies old Air Force One out of Turkey, switches to new jet in Britain for trip home
alerts.summary: President Donald Trump unexpectedly left Turkey on Wednesday aboard an older Air Force One rather than the newly renovated Qatari-donated jet.
alerts.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

alerts.title: Cambridge study puts Ethereum near the lower end of PoS energy intensity
alerts.summary: Cambridge estimated that Ethereum consumes 7.87 GWh annually and has the second-lowest market-value-adjusted energy intensity among the proof-of-stake networks studied.
alerts.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

alerts.title: Modi Seals Deals After Courting Indo-Pacific Partners
alerts.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi used a three-nation tour to deepen India’s Indo-Pacific partnerships, Bloomberg's Swati Pandey reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

alerts.title: Natural Gas Falls on Shifting Weather Forecasts
alerts.summary: U.S. natural gas futures fell after weekend updates took some of the chill out of early February weather forecasts.

alerts.title: SK Hynix shares slide 12% in Seoul after stellar Nasdaq debut
alerts.summary: SK Hynix Inc. shares tumbled over 12% in Seoul on Monday after the chipmaker's blockbuster Nasdaq debut.
